rows.cycle_goal_summary: Gather initial wood (logs) from nearby spruce, then reassess crafting needs for starter tools/shelter materials.
rows.what_happened: Jun executed collectLogs successfully: the action-skill postcondition passed and reported that logs were collected, with supporting runtime evidence references (observe/collect_logs/wait). The cycle’s physical progress classifier for the wait step indicated no additional progress beyond the log collection itself.

rows.cycle_goal_summary: Convert the collected spruce log into initial crafting inputs (planks and sticks), then craft basic early-utility items only if recipe ingredients are now verified in inventory.
rows.what_happened: Jun successfully ran the craftPlanksAndSticks action and the verifier indicates craft_item outputs were produced and confirmed by runtime evidence (postcondition passed).

rows.cycle_goal_summary: Craft the next basic item from current spruce_planks (2x2 inventory crafting) and then re-observe inventory to verify the crafted outputs.
rows.what_happened: Jun/ npc_b executed a craft_item primitive to craft sticks from spruce_planks. Runtime evidence indicates craft_item succeeded and inventory count increased from 0 to 4 sticks (inventory delta +4). Verifier status for the cycle passed.

rows.cycle_goal_summary: Re-observe live inventory, then craft the next early utility (prefer a wooden pickaxe path if ingredients are available) using only verified inputs.
rows.what_happened: Jun attempted craftWoodenPickaxe via craft_with_table. Runtime observe succeeded, but craft_with_table was blocked: the nearest crafting table remained too far away due to a pathfinder failure (actor did not reach the table to complete the craft). The action-skill postcondition failed; no crafted wooden_pickaxe (or equivalent) creation was evidenced.

rows.cycle_goal_summary: Re-observe and secure a usable nearby crafting station: confirm whether a placed crafting_table is within reachable distance; if not, move to a suitable location and place a crafting_table block, then re-observe the world block afterward.
rows.what_happened: Jun used placeCraftingTable, but place_block was blocked because the crafting_table item was not present in inventory at the time. The runtime result shows observe ran (ok), and place_block (blocked) with reason: “place_block requires crafting_table in inventory.” No in-world crafting_table placement was verified after the attempted placement.
